title: rudbeckia serotina
intro: Rudbeckia serotina, also known as the Green-Eyed Black-Eyed Susan, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Rudbeckia serotina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
